simple_types.name: GPIO_Pin
simple_types.code:
type GPIO_Pin is
  (Pin_0, Pin_1, Pin_2, Pin_3, Pin_4, Pin_5, Pin_6, Pin_7, …, Pin_15);

simple_types.name: Internal_Pin_Resistors
simple_types.code:
type Internal_Pin_Resistors is (Floating, Pull_Up, Pull_Down) with
   Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Pin_IO_Modes
simple_types.code:
type Pin_IO_Modes is (Mode_In, Mode_Out, Mode_AF, Mode_Analog) with
   Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Pin_Output_Speeds
simple_types.code:
type Pin_Output_Speeds is (Speed_2MHz, Speed_25MHz, Speed_50MHz) with
   Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Pin_Output_Types
simple_types.code:
type Pin_Output_Types is (Push_Pull, Open_Drain) with
   Size => 1;

array_types.name: GPIO_Pins
array_types.code: type GPIO_Pins is array (Positive range <>) of GPIO_Pin;

documentation.description:
Note that, in addition to aggregates, the language-defined catenation
operator "&" is available for types GPIO_Pin and GPIO_Pins, allowing one
to construct GPIO_Pins values conveniently

array_types.name: GPIO_Points
array_types.code: type GPIO_Points is array (Positive range <>) of GPIO_Point;

record_types.name: GPIO_Port_Configuration

tagged_types.name: GPIO_Point

fields.name: Periph
fields.description:
Port should be a not null access, but this raises an exception
during elaboration.

constants.name: All_Pins

documentation.description:
Returns True iff all of the bits specified by Pins are set (not zero) in
the Port input data register; returns False otherwise.

Returns True if any one of the bits specified by Pins is set (not zero)
in the Port input data register; returns False otherwise.

For This.Port.all, negates the output data register bit specified by
This.Pin (one becomes zero and vice versa). Other pins are unaffected.

parameters.name: This
parameters.description:
For This.Port.all, sets the output data register bit specified by
This.Pin to zero. Other pins are unaffected.

documentation.description:
For the given GPIO port, locks the current configuration of Pin until
the MCU is reset.

parameters.name: Pins
parameters.description:
For the given GPIO port, sets of all of the output data register bits
specified by Pins to zero. Other pins are unaffected.

For the given GPIO ports, negates all of the output data register bis
specified by Pins (ones become zeros and vice versa). Other pins are
unaffected.

documentation.description:
For Point.Pin on Point.Port.all, sets the alternate function
specified by AF

For Point.Pin on Point.Port.all, sets the alternate function
specified by AF

For Point.Pin on the Point.Port.all, configures the
characteristics specified by Config

For Point.Pin on the Point.Port.all, configures the
characteristics specified by Config

subprograms.name: Drive
subprograms.code: procedure Drive (This : in out GPIO_Point; Condition : Boolean)

documentation.description: Drives This high or low (set or clear) based on the value of Condition

parameters.name: This
parameters.description:
For the given GPIO port, locks the current configuration of Pin until
the MCU is reset.

documentation.description:
For the given GPIO port, locks the current configuration of Pin until
the MCU is reset.

Returns True if the bit specified by This.Pin is set (not zero) in the
input data register of This.Port.all; returns False otherwise.
Defined for readability when only one pin is specified in GPIO_Pins

For This.Port.all, negates the output data register bit specified by
This.Pin (one becomes zero and vice versa). Other pins are unaffected.

parameters.name: This
parameters.description:
For This.Port.all, sets the output data register bit specified by
This.Pin to one. Other pins are unaffected.

For This.Port.all, sets the output data register bit specified by
This.Pin to zero. Other pins are unaffected.

documentation.description:
For the given GPIO port, locks the current configuration of Pin until
the MCU is reset.

parameters.name: Pins
parameters.description:
For the given GPIO port, sets all of the output data register bits
specified by Pins to one. Other pins are unaffected.

For the given GPIO port, sets of all of the output data register bits
specified by Pins to zero. Other pins are unaffected.

For the given GPIO ports, negates all of the output data register bis
specified by Pins (ones become zeros and vice versa). Other pins are
unaffected.

subprograms.name: Set_Mode
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Mode
  (This : in out GPIO_Point; Mode : HAL.GPIO.GPIO_Config_Mode)

subprograms.name: Set_Pull_Resistor
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Pull_Resistor
  (This : in out GPIO_Point; Pull : HAL.GPIO.GPIO_Pull_Resistor)

subprograms.name: Support
subprograms.code:
function Support
  (This : GPIO_Point; Capa : HAL.GPIO.Capability) return Boolean

documentation.description:
For This.Port.all, negates the output data register bit specified by
This.Pin (one becomes zero and vice versa). Other pins are unaffected.

For the given GPIO port, locks the current configuration of Pin until
the MCU is reset.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.description:
For the given GPIO ports, negates all of the output data register bis
specified by Pins (ones become zeros and vice versa). Other pins are
unaffected.
